ticket_text: My HackerRank submission keeps showing Wrong Answer even though my code works perfectly on my local machine. I tested all the examples and they pass. What could be wrong?
response: **Subject: Re: Wrong Answer on Submission**  Thank you for reaching out, and I completely understand how frustrating it can be when your code works locally but shows "Wrong Answer" on submission!  This is actually a common situation, and there are a few things worth checking based on our support documentation:  **Why this might be happening:** Even if your solution passes all the provided examples, HackerRank evaluates your submission against **additional hidden test cases** that may include scenarios beyond the visible examples. Your solution may be passing the sample cases but failing on one or more of these.  **Here's what we recommend:**  - **Review the problem statement carefully** — make sure you haven't missed any constraints or requirements - **Check edge cases**, such as:   - Empty inputs   - Maximum possible values   - Minimum possible values - **Test beyond the provided examples** by creating your own test cases that push the boundaries of the problem constraints  **Good news on resubmissions:** Most challenges allow unlimited resubmissions, so you can keep refining your solution. Your best score or latest submission (depending on the challenge type) will be recorded. Just be sure to check the specific problem rules in case there are any submission limits.  If you've gone through all of the above and are still experiencing issues, I'd recommend reaching out to HackerRank's support team directly for further assistance, as they may be able to provide more specific guidance.  Best of luck with your solution! 😊

ticket_text: How do I use contactless payment with my Visa debit card?
response: **Subject: Re: Contactless Payment with Your Visa Debit Card**  ---  Thank you for reaching out! Great news — using contactless payment with your Visa debit card is quick and easy.  Here's how to do it:  1. **Check for the contactless symbol** — Look for the four curved lines symbol on both your Visa debit card and the payment terminal at the checkout. 2. **Hold your card near the terminal** — Position your card within **1-2 inches** of the terminal. 3. **Wait for confirmation** — The payment typically completes in **under a second**.  That's all there is to it! Contactless payments are supported at most modern payment terminals, so you should find it widely available.  Please note that while Visa debit cards use the same Visa payment network as credit cards, funds will be drawn **directly from your linked bank account** when you make a purchase.  If you experience any issues with a specific terminal or your card's contactless functionality, we'd recommend reaching out to your **card-issuing bank** directly, as they will be best equipped to assist with account-specific concerns.  Is there anything else we can help you with today?  **Visa Customer Support**

ticket_text: I joined a HackerRank contest but can't see any problems even though the contest already started.
response: **Subject: Re: Unable to See Contest Problems**  Hi there,  Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble accessing the contest problems — I understand how frustrating that can be, especially during an active contest!  Since the contest has already started, here are a couple of steps to help resolve the issue:  1. **Verify the contest start time** – Please double-check the official contest start time and confirm it has passed in **your local timezone**, as there can sometimes be timezone discrepancies.  2. **Clear your browser cache and refresh** – If the contest has indeed started, try clearing your browser cache and refreshing the page. This often resolves visibility issues with contest problems.  If you've tried both of these steps and are still unable to see the problems, we recommend reaching out to **HackerRank's support team directly**, as the issue may require a closer look at your account or contest access.  Hope this gets you back on track soon — good luck with the contest!  Best regards, Customer Support Team
